untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 12-month price position (low/middle/high) and black candle pattern recognition. The allowed indicators do not include a 12-month high/low detector or explicit candle color/pattern classification. The source text contains incomplete/corrupted data making parameter extraction impossible. Specific performance metrics (success_rate_bull, average_rise_pct, etc.) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified.
translation_notes: Black candle identified using body < 0 (negative close relative to open). Price position logic inferred from price_pos_20 but lacks 12-month window specification. Exit conditions defaulted to reasonable reversals since marked AUTHOR_SILENT. The candle_end_plus_1_day metrics (1.40% for L, 1.90% for M) suggest 1-day forward returns but cannot be directly encoded without explicit forward-looking targets.
